label: NIF Record Fusion Yield
deltaNote: Feb 2024 shot achieved 5.2 MJ output vs. 3.15 MJ in the Dec 2022 ignition shot

label: ITER Assembly Progress
contestNote: ITER Baseline 2024 revised first plasma to 2033; assembly slowed by vacuum vessel dimensional defects and thermal shield stress corrosion cracks

label: Total Private Fusion Capital Raised
deltaNote: Cumulative private investment across 43+ companies globally; rolling 12-month rate softened to ~$1.6B (Apr 2026) from $2.64B peak (Jul 2025), per TechCrunch/FIA

label: KSTAR Plasma Duration Record
deltaNote: Achieved April 2024 with upgraded tungsten divertors; goal is 300 seconds by 2026

label: EAST Sustained Plasma Record
deltaNote: January 20, 2025 at 100M°C; longest sustained H-mode plasma in history

label: Active Private Fusion Companies
deltaNote: 25 in USA; 35 of 45 surveyed forecast commercially viable pilot plants by 2030–2035

label: ITER First Plasma Target
contestNote: Original target was 2025; revised to 2033 (first plasma) and 2039 (D-T burning plasma). Budget grew from ~€5B (2006) to €20B+ (2024).

label: CFS HTS Magnet Field Strength
delta: World record for large-scale HTS magnet
deltaNote: Achieved September 5, 2021 using 267 km of YBCO tape; enables compact SPARC tokamak design
